es.name: Logaritmo
es.description: Calcula el logaritmo de un número en cualquier base.
es.seo_description: Calcula el logaritmo de un número en cualquier base. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Con explicacion de estadisticas.
es.example_label: Calculate the logarithm of 256 with base 4.
es.result_context: The logarithm {log_val} is the power to which the base must be raised to get x.
steps: Apply change of base formula: ln(256) ÷ ln(4)
mistakes: Trying to calculate log of negative number or zero
Confusing natural log with log base 10

en.name: Logarithm Calculator
en.description: Calculate the logarithm of a number in any base.
en.seo_description: Logarithm Calculator. Logarithm Calculator = f(Number, Base) — Number, Base to find Logarithm. Step-by-step solution with worked example for statistics.
en.example_label: Calculate the logarithm of 256 with base 4.
en.result_context: The logarithm {log_val} is the power to which the base must be raised to get x.
steps: Apply change of base formula: ln(256) ÷ ln(4)
mistakes: Trying to calculate log of negative number or zero
Confusing natural log with log base 10

range_hints.x: Typischer Wert entre 0 y 500. Valor por defecto: 100.
range_hints.base: Typischer Wert entre 0 y 500. Valor por defecto: 10.
